hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'knowledge-graph/'; then uv run python -c "from scripts.build_plan_archive import DB_PATH; print(f'Plan archive: {DB_PATH}')" 2>/dev/null; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'pytest|make test'; then echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | python3 /home/petteri/Dropbox/knowledge-hub/repositories/vascadia/scripts/parse_test_output.py --json /home/petteri/Dropbox/knowledge-hub/repositories/vascadia/tests/last_test_result.json 2>/dev/null || true; fi
